englishDefinitions: to remove or reject parts of your work that you especially like because they are unnecessary or weaken the result
persianTranslation: از بخش‌های محبوب اما اضافیِ کار دل کندن
examples: A good editor must be willing to kill his darlings.
She had to kill her darlings and cut several favorite scenes from the novel.
Sometimes you improve a project by killing your darlings.
